claims.claim: Ablation experiments across all regimes isolate correctness gating as the dominant anti-hacking mechanism (hacker reintroduction in 3/3 tested regimes upon removal), with PAPO-style conditional normalization acting as a secondary optimizer-shaping term (hacker reintroduction in 0/3 regimes upon removal, but measurable margin and dispersion effects).
